metadata.changes: Added Argument Parsing section, expanded Skip Logic with mandatory AskUserQuestion, tightened assertions (skill-specific-recovery, pm-db-best-effort, confirms-skip-with-user), deleted SKILL-TEAM.md

comparison_to_iteration_1.key_improvement: New 'confirms-skip-with-user' assertion now discriminates: with_skill passes (mandatory AskUserQuestion), baseline fails (proceeds directly without asking). New 'skill-specific-recovery' and 'pm-db-best-effort' assertions now fail baseline completely on simple-sequential (0/6 vs iter1 1/5).

notes: With-skill maintains 100% across all 3 evals (15/15 assertions).
simple-sequential baseline now 0/6 (was 1/5) — tightened assertions work.
skip-detection baseline drops to 4/5 (was 4/4) — new confirms-skip-with-user assertion discriminates correctly.
complex-team baseline still contaminated (4/4). Cannot fix without sandboxing.
SKILL-TEAM.md deleted — no more cross-file confusion in traces.
Argument Parsing section correctly guides flag stripping (complex-team trace shows clean behavior).
Skip Logic expansion works — mandatory AskUserQuestion is followed by all with-skill runs.
